feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: A material is extended to new plant and storage location but it is redirecting to free freight
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client have extend a "xyz" material to 1800 and 2000 plant & storage location. Before this item is used as free shipment or with no frieght but after extending it new plant they want to charge freight for that item. But it is still picking free freight for every order they make, even in ecom it is showing as 0$ for all freight.

Every order defaults to FF free freight in  customer group 1 in additional data header details. I have tried to maintain condition record with this combination but this is affecting other ecom orders, so i have deleted this condition record. 

IF only the order default to PPA Prepaid & add in customer group1 in additonal data, then i can maintain the condition record and i feel it will work. where can i look for this setting and please feel free to suggest your solution.

Note: Customer is one time customer in ECom.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: ATP check at Sales Contract
entry.content:
Hello,

Can we have the ATP check at Sales Contract and then have the subsequent order consume the same?

Example how the Sales Order gets replaced with the Outbound delivery in MD04 , is the same thing possible with Sales Contract as well.

Desired Scenario:

Create Sales Contract --> Sales Contract Appears in MD04 --> Sales Order Created with Reference to Contract --> Order gets replaced in MD04.

Thanks,

P

entry.title: How to manage "active" subcontracting in public cloud
entry.content:
We need to manage the subcontracting scenario where the customer send us some material and we perform some activities via production order. The material is then sent back to the customer and the customer is billed for the activities performed. 

The material sent by the customer does not have to have an impact on our stock valuation, since it is not ours.

It is not possible to manage via service and repair process due to the volume of serial numbers to manage.

How can we do so?

entry.title: How to handle Purchase Orders and Sales Orders with Old Material Numbers?
entry.content:
We are in the process of replacing around 9000 Materials with New Material Codes (This is done to activate Automatic Batch Split Valuation). Old Material Numbers will be maintained in MARA-BISMT. Stock will be moved to new material code. I have a few questions regarding this.

1. Should existing Purchase Orders and Sales Orders be closed before I do this activity? Or is there a way to use the new material codes to do goods receipt for existing POs and deliveries for existing SOs?

2. How do I handle sales return of older sales orders?

entry.title: Relationship icon to view idocs is inactive on sales order & Generic IDOC screen
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I have maintained the Parameter 'SD_SWU_ACTIVE' using SU3. I'm able to see the generic IDOC & Sales Order viceversa using this parameter. But for the ASAPIO Generic IDOC which is having Basic type '/ASADEV/ACI_GENERIC_IDOC' I'm not able to see the relationship between Sales Order & Generic IDOC in SAP. 

Kindly look into it & help me. 

Regards, 

Rahul More

entry.title: stop return s.o to be created when returned quantity equal to or bigger than the original billing
entry.content: Stop the process / creation of return sales order with billing reference in case of the returned quantity in return sales order equal to or bigger than the quantity of original billing in SD .

entry.title: ODN number range should be continues for both domestic and export documents
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently i am facing a issue in ODN numbering. My Indian client requirement is to have same ODN number range for both domestic and export documents. Domestic invoice configuration for ODN is already done, now they need ODN for Export.

I have configured ODN for Export invoice and number ranges i have copied from domestic invoice, but the requirement is to have a continuous number range for both Domestic and Export, but when i have tested the export document, the ODN number is not continuous to domestic, two tax invoice numbers with same number is been generated

Domestic invoice

Export Invoice ODN

Please kindly help me in this on urgent basis.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: BP customer not able to save as showing error as no entry of the field country
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a problem in BP. While creating a BP customer with role general it is showing error as ‘required filed country has no entry’. Although I have maintained the filed country.

Message no. R1304

entry.title: variant matching at lower BOM items
entry.content:
Is it possbile to replace lower BOM items with variant matching? 

 

e.g. Material A has a BOM consisting of B C and D configurable materials. All these explode  in a SO when A is configured.

when A is configured in a sales order, B is also copied with the same char values. For the Char values, B has a material variant B1. Is it possible to replace B with B1 in a sales order where A is configured?

entry.title: Workflow not triggering when importing sales orders
entry.content: My workflow is setup correctly because when I create orders via Manage sales orders, the workflow triggers immediately. However when importing via the excel spreadsheet in the Import sales orders app, the workflow does not trigger. Please assist.

entry.title: SO with 2 line items with stcok confirms only 1St line item
entry.content: Disregard this question, it was posted in the wrong forum.

entry.title: Sales Order with 2 line items only confirms the 1st, but not the 2nd one
entry.content:
Hello SAP community;

 

Please your help on this issue; I create a Sales order with 2 line items; both of them have enough stock; for the first line item; gets confirmation automatically, while for the 2nd item does not.

 

 

See ATP Qty. shows only for 1st line Item…

 

 

When the order is saved, I perform the availability check for 2nd line item; it shows that the 2nd line Item can be confirmed.

Why it wasn’t confirmed when the item was entered into the sales order Like the first one? If the material has enough stock it needs to be confirmed automatically like the first one since these Sales Doc. Type should create its delivery automatically so all materials that have stock need to be delivered.

 

 

 

I do not see any reason for this to happen since:

  • both materials have enough stock
  • both of them have the same checking group in Material Master
  • Stock is in the Same Plant and SLoc; so the checking ule is the same for both

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: SD: Mass update of processed bulling document (vf02) after new output type redeterminantion
entry.content:
I've customize automatic determination of new output types and now I need open each billing document via VF02 and save for re-determination.  If there any way to update already processed invoices automatically?

VF31 - will work for output when correspondent record in NAST is already exist.

VF24 - not help.

SDBONT06 - is something also.

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: After saving the Sales contract, getting error decimal places are not permitted.
While saving the Sales contract getting error of Decimal places are not permitted.
How SAP SD module is implemented at Maritime Ports?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am in talk with one  SAP company for implementing SAP modules like SD,FICO,HR etc at one of the big maritime ports in India. Can any one tell me how SAP is implemented  in maritime ports?

Your suggestion will be very helpful before i join the project.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Wrong delivery date - Quote Order to Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello

We are facing some issues when sales orders are created referencing quote orders,

The deliveries are created with the wrong delivery promise date, in sales order it should be 3 days starting from  quote date creation, but it's not take on.

We had a recent migration from ECC to S/4, I checked the legacy system and all the configuration are similar in both environment 

Could you please help with this topic

entry.title: To control Text types for output document
entry.content:
For sales order- all the text types, if maintained in the document are getting populated in the output document (Order confirmation).

This should not be the case as we also have internal text types and text types which help in communication between teams/LOB’s which should not be sent to the Customer.

Can the text types that are seen in the output document be controlled.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales NW ABAP Print and Output Management 

#

entry.title: Can we add more decimal places for invoices and quantities in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My questions here is twofold:

1) Is it possibles to have decimal places for quantities where we have up to 5 digits after comma?

2) Is it possible to have material prices with 6 digits after the comma? Also showing up like this on invoices etc.
